items.title: Follow up on Echelon AI intro to Morgan Stanley (Tunde)
items.context: Email from eddie@echelonai.com on Apr 24: Fan introduced Echelon co-founders to Morgan Stanley contacts (Tunde, Akshay); Eddie proposed meeting times — confirm the connection lands and a meeting gets booked.

items.title: Check with Martin (Array) on Optery conflict and circle back
items.context: Email from derek@fin.capital to lawrence@optery.com on Apr 22: 'We're also checking with Martin from Array on conflict and will circle back shortly.'

items.title: Review Opti sales deck and Gong demo recordings from Barak
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Apr 23: Shared sales deck, Gong recording of demo with WM's CISO, and 5-min AWS pitch video for diligence review.

items.title: Intro Sentra CEO (Ashwin) to Amex AI investments team
items.context: Email thread Apr 20-21: Fan committed to connecting Ashwin Gopinath with 'my friend who leads AI investments and partnerships at Amex' — Ashwin confirmed strong interest in the introduction.

items.title: Request VanishID round process and dynamics update from Matt
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital to matt@vanishid.com on Apr 25: Logan asked 'If you have an update on round process / dynamics would be great as well' while committing to review materials over the weekend.

items.title: Prep for NYU Stern venture startup judging session
items.context: Calendar event 'NYU - Building Venture Scale Startups, Judge' on Apr 29 at NYU Stern — Derek is judging alongside Dorothy (Flybridge) and Mirit (Laconia Capital).

items.title: Prep for Spectrum Security intro meeting with Meny
items.context: Calendar event 'Introduction | Spectrum Security <> Fin Capital' on Apr 28 with meny@spectrum.security — new company intro organized by Daria.

items.title: Prep for Blast Security intro call with Boris
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital // Blast Security' on Apr 29 with boris@blast.security — intro meeting organized by Richie.
